chunks.content:
Article: Win Free EVANGELION 222 DVD or Blu ray
[]: Win Free EVANGELION: 2.22 DVD or Blu-ray!             Quote Post by kpa » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:54 am Hi everyone! I'm new here and wanted to let other EVA fans know that my website SciFi Japan has partnered with FUNimation to do an EVANGELION: 2.22 contest for free copies of the DVD or Blu-ray. No purchase necessary or any of that garbage... we're just looking to give away some DVDs and Blu-rays of this film to people who will enjoy 'em. The contest runs through March 24th. If you'd like to enter you can do so at: http://www.scifijapan.com/articles/2011/03/14/win-evangelion-2-22-on-dvd-or-blu-ray/

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:37 am Thanks for the heads-up! I'll have my fingers crossed.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Mar 16, 2011 9:32 am Sure why not Loved the piece you guys did about Akio Jissoji, btw :)

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:32 am Thats pretty cool, thanks.

[]: I never win anything. (I'm reverse jynxing myself)             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:10 pm Entered.
